case_title: COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY vs. BARIA, HENFEL M.

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY SERVED OCT-04-1992, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BARIA, HENFEL M.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARIA, HENFEL M. $647.50 PRINCIPAL, $161.87 ATTORNEY FEES, $151.98 INTEREST, $123.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,084.85

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $120.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT BARIA, HENFEL M.
CASE TERMINATED: 10-DEC-92 TERM CODE: J JUDGEMENT FILED

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT BARIA, HENFEL M. SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-26-1993

ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY
